app.subtitle: A precision date calculator with timezone and DST awareness, built for cross-region calculations and Chinese lunar calendar workflows.
app.title: ChronoSphere

privacy.label: Local-first
privacy.body: No login or tracking. All calculations stay in your browser.

timezone.empty: No matching region or timezone found

offset.intervalHelp: "Interval X days": count forward X days from the start date. For example, June 1 plus 2 days is June 3.
offset.intervalHelpBackward: "Interval X days": count backward X days from the start date. For example, June 1 minus 2 days is May 30.
offset.thDayHelp: "Nth day": the start date counts as day 1. For example, the 2nd day after June 1 is June 2 (X must be at least 1).
offset.thDayHelpBackward: "Nth day": the start date counts as day 1. For example, the 2nd day before June 1 is May 31 (X must be at least 1).
offset.thDayMinimum: In “Nth day” mode, X must be at least 1
offset.placeholder: Enter valid values to start calculating

interval.bothHelp: “Include both ends”: the count includes both the start and end dates.
interval.startHelp: “Include start only”: count the first day but not the last. For example, June 1 to June 2 is 1 day.
interval.endHelp: “Include end only”: count the last day but not the first. For example, June 1 to June 2 is 1 day.
interval.excludeHelp: “Exclude both ends”: count only the days in between.
interval.absoluteTime: Absolute elapsed time (from local midnight to local midnight)
interval.placeholder: Choose a date range to begin
interval.errorPlaceholder: Invalid start date or end date
interval.negativeNote: (Start date is later than the end date; the result is negative)

lunar.leapMonth: This is a leap month (for example, leap fourth month)
lunar.error: Please enter a valid day offset
lunar.invalidLunar: That lunar date does not exist in this year. Please check the leap-month or day selection.
lunar.selectPrompt: Choose a lunar date to begin

dst.title: DST transition audit
dst.noTransitionSingle: Within the selected range, {{zone}} has no DST transition.
dst.noTransitionDual: Within the selected range, neither of the two selected timezones has a DST transition.
dst.detectedCount: Detected {{count}} DST transition events in the selected range:
dst.shiftForward: Clocks move forward by {{hours}} hour(s). This day is {{hours}} hour(s) shorter (usually from 2:00 to 3:00).
dst.shiftBackward: Clocks move backward by {{hours}} hour(s). This day is {{hours}} hour(s) longer (usually 1:00 repeats after 2:00).
